name: Camera Sling Pack - heyday™ Beige Heather: Waterproof Woven Polyester, Front Zip Pocket, Unstructured Design
description:
Carry your camera gear securely with the Camera Sling Pack by heyday™. Crafted from recycled polyester in a minimal beige design, this waterproof pack provides protection for your photography equipment. The dedicated lens pockets for organized storage and a front zip pocket add to the convenience. Backed by a 1-year limited warranty, carry your camera with ease and capture life with confidence.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
